autonomyLevel.description: How much freedom the agent has to act without asking. low = asks for everything except safe reads. medium = asks for risky/dangerous. full = only asks for dangerous.

timezone.description: IANA timezone string (e.g. 'America/New_York'). 'auto' detects from system.

curiosityIntervalHours.description: How often the agent autonomously explores new topics.

enableJournaling.description: Whether the agent writes a daily journal entry at evening time.

enableMorningScan.description: Whether the agent does a morning scan for new information.

enableIdleExploration.description: Whether the agent explores when idle/bored.

memoryBackend.description: Memory backend. 'qmd' recommended for dreaming/hybrid search.

communicationStyle.description: How the agent communicates with its human partner.

requireApprovalFor.description: Risk levels that always require approval. Empty = rely on autonomyLevel.

desireDecayBaseRate.description: Base daily decay rate for unfilled desires (0-100). Lower = desires last longer.

maxDesires.description: Maximum number of active desires at once.

diminishingReturns.description: Whether same-type rewards get smaller over time (anti-addiction).
